commit.subject: LU-18431 tests: valid DD fail in saniy-quota_80
commit.message:
LU-18431 tests: valid DD fail in saniy-quota_80

1 or 7MB write fail are valid cases as we write up to
the QP limit(10MB). In a such rare incident it is possible
that the problem this test aimed to demonstrate would not
be reproduced.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-quota,sanity-quota,sanity-quota
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-quota env=ONLY=80,ONLY_REPEAT=10
Fixes: 61ec1e0f2c ("LU-15031 quota: reseed glbe in qmt_lvbo_udate")
Signed-off-by: Sergey Cheremencev <scherementsev@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Ib367ab8cf5cdfe197b41c45dbf491643e27e7a63
